title: Player Statistics
description: Adds a command to your Fabric server that gives players insights into everyone's statistics.
body:
# Player Statistics Adds a command to your Fabric server that gives players insights into everyone's statistics. Let them boast and compete for the most meaningless statistics there are! Start by checking out the [**gallery**](https://modrinth.com/mod/playerstatistics/gallery) to get an impression of what this mod looks like in-game. ## Features * **No setup required**
Just drop this mod along with its dependencies in your server's mods folder and you're good to go! * **Easy to use**
All commands come with a complete list of tab-suggestions and an intuitive interface to guide you through all available options! * **Lightning fast**
A database will be initialized from existing statistics files for retrieving large amounts of data extremely quickly. Additionally, all queries are run **asynchronously** to ensure that any impact on server performance is kept to a bare minimum! * **Localization**
Server-side translations are provided for all elements of this mod — if you can, please consider translating them into your preferred language! See also the repository's [README](https://github.com/kr8gz/PlayerStatistics/blob/master/README.md) for more information, and please [create an issue](https://github.com/kr8gz/PlayerStatistics/issues/new) if you encounter any problems!
